title: xanthophyllum neglectum
intro: Xanthophyllum neglectum is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the xanthophyllum plant. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum neglectum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
